own_review_points: Validation makes systemTopicDefaultNumPartitions mandatory for PARTITIONED -> breaks existing stored namespace policies/CLI (back-compat)
BrokerService.getDefaultNumPartitions: getSystemTopicDefaultNumPartitions() returns nullable Integer; old policies lack the field -> NPE on unboxing for system topics
No CLI (CmdNamespaces) option for the new namespace-level override -> namespace feature unusable
Test sets systemTopicDefaultNumPartitions == defaultNumPartitions (both PARTITIONS) so independence is not actually verified
Human: default should be -1 (fall back to defaultNumPartitions) for back-compat; check value > 0
No symmetric NON_PARTITIONED validation rejecting systemTopicDefaultNumPartitions
notes: Strong review. P1 breaking-validation/back-compat = critical (matches human compat points). P2 NPE unboxing = good (aligns with human fallback suggestion). P3 NON_PARTITIONED symmetry, P4 missing CLI (matches human SUMMARY re pulsar-admin), P6 test-coverage gap all good/grounded. P5 doc wording = trivial. Human's -1-default/fallback nuance is effectively covered by P1/P2 recommendations, so no genuine miss. No wrongs/fabs.
